title: Manolo: The Boy Who Made Shoes for Lizards
original_title: Manolo: The Boy Who Made Shoes for Lizards
overview: An in-depth portrait of MANOLO BLAHNIK, self-confessed 'cobbler' and the man regarded by most influential fashion figures as 'the best shoe-maker of the 20th and 21st centuries. A film for anyone who has ever looked longingly at a pair of... 'Manolos'
